title: Senior Key Account Manager (East / 5 days / Freight Forwarding)
description:
About the Role

As a Key Account Manager, you will be responsible for building and nurturing long-term relationships with major clients to ensure retention and sustainable growth. You will develop a deep understanding of clients’ businesses, needs, and challenges, and work closely with them to provide tailored solutions that add value.

This role requires a proactive approach to client engagement — resolving issues, anticipating future needs, and identifying opportunities for collaboration. The top three key priorities for success in this role include maintaining a growth mindset, demonstrating strong communication skills, and having the ability to explore and collaborate on new business opportunities.

Main Responsibilities

  • Develop and manage a portfolio of high-value global and regional key accounts.
  • Design and implement long-term strategies to drive client retention, satisfaction, and business growth.
  • Understand client needs and requirements, and resolve issues promptly to build trust and loyalty.
  • Foster strong, long-term professional relationships with clients to create mutually beneficial partnerships.
  • Propose and implement solutions to client challenges within agreed timelines.
  • Protect existing business relationships and minimize client churn to competitors.
  • Act as the primary liaison between clients and internal teams, ensuring effective communication and smooth collaboration.
  • Identify high-value clients and develop targeted strategies to strengthen partnerships.
  • Prepare timely and accurate reports, including CRM updates and monthly account reviews.
  • Serve as the key facilitator for managing Accounts Receivables for assigned accounts.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Sales, Business Management, Freight Forwarding, Logistics & Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
  • Minimum of 3–5 years’ experience in the logistics or freight forwarding industry, with exposure to sales and business development.
  • Proven experience in handling conglomerate accounts — experience in Healthcare, Medical Devices, Semiconductor, or Electronics industries will be highly regarded.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills; confident, outgoing, and responsive.
  • Strong proficiency in MS Office applications, with solid communication, negotiation, and presentation skills.
  • Demonstrated organizational, account management, and client relationship-building skills.
  • Strategic thinker with strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.
  • Proactive, resourceful, and capable of working both independently and in a team.
  • Passionate about sales, with strong teamwork, interpersonal, and relationship management skills.
  • Candidates with relevant managerial experience may be considered for a Senior Key Account Manager role.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.

Wecruit Pte ltd

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
